intent.problem: Shoppers cannot tell the full order cost before checkout
intent.outcome: A shopper understands the expected cost before committing
success_signals: Shipping cost or its uncertainty is visible before checkout

findings.finding: Shipping costs are not visible on the cart
findings.recommendation: Show a shipping estimate or explicit uncertainty before checkout
acceptance: The cart shows a shipping estimate or explicit uncertainty before checkout

evidence.summary: Captured the existing cart at http://localhost:3000
